Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and aims to equip students with language proficiency and application skills for employment (Target 4.4). Lesson 10 explicitly focuses on 'education.'
evidence: To possess basic language proficiency and application skills
